dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4099 IS: Whistleblower Anti-Gag Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Grassley introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, to ensure that Federal employees are fully informed of their whistleblower rights.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Whistleblower Anti-Gag Act of 2026.
Section 2302(a)(2)(C)(i) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by inserting or in the case of a nondisclosure policy, form, or agreement described under subsection (b)(13) after (D).
